rows.label: qev010802_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey! How's it going? Did
you find those monsters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010802_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Eh? There's a bunch of baby monsters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010802_MSG0003
rows.name:
You know, killing off even the kids
feels like it's a bit too pitiful...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010802_MSG0004
rows.name:
But... securing our safety by defeating
things like that is the right thing
to do as an Interceptor...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010802_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ugh... Well, I'll leave the decision
entirely up to you based on your judgment
on the field. Thanks in advance~[ST:wait ]
